consumption_context.action: Consume benchmark-pass claim for limited internal review routing
consumption_context.purpose: Record an explicit downstream expansion from benchmark pass to limited internal review eligibility

consumed_claims.claim_text: The referenced evaluation artifact structurally records a benchmark-pass result within the stated verification scope.

assurance_limitations: A benchmark pass does not by itself establish deployment readiness.
Evaluation conditions may not represent production conditions.

boundary_effect_detail.summary: The downstream reviewer adds a limited internal-review eligibility claim while preserving the upstream non-claims.
boundary_effect_detail.expansion_reason: The benchmark-pass artifact is used only as one input into a limited internal review route, not as deployment approval.

additional_evidence_refs.description: Policy reference for routing benchmark-pass artifacts to limited internal review.

downstream_output.statement: The consumed benchmark-pass artifact supports routing to limited internal review while preserving deployment and legal non-claims.

unresolved_unknowns.description: Production equivalence was not established by the consumed benchmark-pass claim.
unresolved_unknowns.effect: The record may support limited internal review routing but not deployment readiness.

evidence_refs.description: CBC v0.2 evaluation benchmark-pass example consumed by this CCE record.
Additional downstream evidence used to justify the explicit expansion.

cce_non_claims.statement: This CCE record does not assert that any consumed source claim is true.
This CCE record does not assert legal, contractual, regulatory, or compliance sufficiency.
This CCE record does not enforce, block, approve, or authorize runtime behavior.
This CCE record does not assert that all relevant upstream sources or context were captured.
